𝗡𝗩𝗜𝗧𝗢𝗣 | Monitoring and managing NVIDIA GPU processes and resources in real-time from the command line.  🔥 Super Hot!

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🐍 Python 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Monitoring and managing NVIDIA GPU processes and resources in real-time from the command line.
📅 Created: Jan 2021 • Updated: May 2026

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Interactive NVIDIA-GPU process viewer
✅ Real-time monitoring of GPU utilization, memory, temperature, power, etc.
✅ Process management (viewing, killing)
✅ CUDA visible devices selection tool
✅ Prometheus exporter for Grafana dashboards
✅ Customizable interface and keybindings
✅ Support for multiple NVIDIA GPUs


━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐ 6.9K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 229 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 22 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

nvitop is an interactive command-line tool for monitoring and managing NVIDIA GPU processes. It provides real-time insights into GPU utilization, memory usage, and running processes, similar to `htop` for CPUs, and includes features for CUDA visible devices selection and Prometheus exporting.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/XuehaiPan/nvitop

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

𝗣𝗬𝗪𝗔𝗟𝗜𝗨𝗠 | To dynamically theme the Chromium browser with colors generated by Pywal, ensuring a consistent color scheme across the user's operating system and browser.  🔍 Worth a Look

❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 💻 Shell 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To dynamically theme the Chromium browser with colors generated by Pywal, ensuring a consistent color scheme across the user's operating system and browser.
📅 Created: Mar 2024 • Updated: Apr 2026

❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Generates Chromium themes using Pywal colors
✅ Automates theme creation via a shell script
✅ Easy integration with Chromium's developer mode
✅ Requires re-execution on Pywal color changes


❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐ 2 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 1 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 0 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Pywalium is a shell script that generates custom themes for the Chromium browser based on colors defined by the Pywal utility. It automates the process of applying dynamic color schemes to Chromium, allowing users to easily match their browser's appearance to their system's wallpaper or Pywal color palette.

❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/simonmader17/pywalium

𝗧𝗨𝗜_𝗕𝗟𝗨𝗘𝗧𝗢𝗢𝗧𝗛 | Managing and interacting with Bluetooth devices from a Linux terminal with a rich TUI.  📈 Growing!

•••••••••••••••••••••••

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🐍 Python 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Managing and interacting with Bluetooth devices from a Linux terminal with a rich TUI.
📅 Created: May 2026 • Updated: May 2026

•••••••••••••••••••••••

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Device listing with status (connected, paired, nearby), signal strength, and battery level
✅ Adapter control (power, visibility, scanning)
✅ Pairing and connection with PIN/passkey handling
✅ AVRCP media control for audio devices
✅ Automatic audio routing via PulseAudio/PipeWire
✅ Bluetooth HID remote control for Smart TVs
✅ No sudo required, operates via D-Bus


•••••••••••••••••••••••

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐ 7 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 1 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 0 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

•••••••••••••••••••••••

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

bluetui is a terminal-based TUI manager for Bluetooth devices on Linux. It provides a user-friendly interface to control adapters, manage paired and nearby devices, and interact with audio and TV remotes, all without requiring sudo privileges.

•••••••••••••••••••••••

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/HelpFreedom/TUI_bluetooth

𝗩𝗜𝗗𝗕𝗘𝗘 | Downloading videos and audio content from a wide variety of online sources through a desktop application.  🔥 Super Hot!

♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 📘 TypeScript 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Downloading videos and audio content from a wide variety of online sources through a desktop application.
📅 Created: Oct 2025 • Updated: May 2026

♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Download videos and audio from 1000+ websites worldwide
✅ Built with Electron and powered by yt-dlp
✅ Modern, clean, and intuitive user interface
✅ One-click pause/resume/retry functionality
✅ Real-time progress tracking and download queue management
✅ RSS auto-download for automatic updates from subscribed feeds
✅ Configurable output containers


♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐ 8.9K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 658 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 30 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

VidBee is an open-source video downloader built with Electron and powered by yt-dlp. It allows users to download videos and audio from over 1000 websites worldwide through an intuitive graphical interface. Key features include support for numerous platforms, a user-friendly download queue, and an RSS auto-download function for background updates.

♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦

Dexter is an autonomous agent designed for deep financial research. It intelligently plans, executes, and refines research tasks using real-time market data and self-validation to provide confident, data-backed answers to complex financial questions.
